overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing first-person exploration of the Sanctuary of Olympia. The player approaches an ancient Greek temple adorned with purple ceremonial decorations, enters through a long colonnaded corridor, and emerges into a sunlit training courtyard populated with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: sanctuary entrance courtyard with ceremonial decorations

events.description: approaching the stone sanctuary entrance with purple draped decorations
ascending the stairs and moving from bright sunlight into the shadowed doorway

agents.ego_description: walking up the cobblestone path toward the sanctuary, ascending the purple-carpeted stone stairs

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the stairs observing the entrance

entered.detail: large classical marble statue of a seated figure on an ornate stone pedestal
ancient stone temple facade with purple banners and gold-trimmed fabric decorations
purple fabric runner with gold embroidery laid over the stone entrance stairs
fluted stone columns wrapped with purple ribbons and orange floral garlands

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit cobblestone courtyard approaching the Sanctuary of Olympia. A large marble statue sits to the right while the temple entrance ahead is adorned with purple ceremonial fabrics. The player ascends the decorated stairs toward the shadowed doorway, passing a robed NPC standing near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered ceremonial colonnade with stone columns

events.description: entering the dark interior corridor from the bright exterior sanctuary entrance
approaching the far end of the colonnade where bright sunlight indicates the courtyard exit

agents.ego_description: navigating through the long covered colonnade, passing between rows of fluted stone columns

entered.detail: tall stone pillars with black painted bases and vertical fluting supporting the wooden ceiling
exposed wooden beam ceiling with hanging purple tassel decorations
large potted palm trees in decorative stone containers along the corridor wall
wooden lattice panels with climbing vines allowing filtered light into the corridor
simple stone seating furniture placed against the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a long, covered colonnade with fluted stone columns and a wooden beam ceiling. Potted palms and stone benches line the walls while purple tassels hang from above. The corridor is dimly lit with light filtering through lattice sections, gradually brightening as the player approaches the far exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open gymnasium training courtyard surrounded by colonnades

events.description: exiting the covered colonnade into the bright open-air gymnasium courtyard
encountering multiple NPCs training and exercising in the sandy courtyard

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor into the sunlit courtyard, observing the training activities and architectural surroundings

notable_agents.action: athlete practicing combat movements and exercises in the sandy courtyard
group of individuals gathered near the far colonnade observing the training

entered.detail: open sandy courtyard surrounded by continuous colonnades on all sides
covered walkway with columns forming the boundary of the courtyard
purple ceremonial mats placed at the exit threshold of the colonnade
large mature tree growing in the center of the sandy training ground

segments.scene_description: The player exits the colonnade into a bright, open courtyard filled with golden afternoon light. The sandy gymnasium training ground is surrounded by perimeter colonnades, with several NPCs practicing athletic activities. Purple ceremonial mats mark the threshold while a large central tree provides shade in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright ceremonial entrance through a shadowed corridor and into a sunlit athletic courtyard. It begins in a cobblestone plaza, passing a large marble statue and ascending decorated stairs adorned with purple fabrics toward a dark doorway. As the camera enters the temple, the scene shifts into a dimly lit, covered colonnade where fluted columns and potted palms line the path under a wooden beam ceiling. The lighting gradually brightens as the camera moves toward the far exit, eventually emerging from the shade into the golden afternoon light of an open gymnasium. The shot finally expands across a sandy training ground where NPCs practice athletic activities beneath the shade of a large central tree.
